programmes.show_description: The usual questions, the legendary lifelines, and Jeremy Clarkson are ready to give Anton du Beke and Fred Sirieix the chance to win a million.
Ranvir Singh hosts the rapid and ruthless quiz as contestants Sam and Sue, Susan and Teresa, and Yousif and Ollie take on Riddlemaster Henry Lewis in a bid to solve his riddles.
Join Stephen Mulhern to find out if Jemma can open the right boxes in the right order to be left with 100,000 pounds.
Hoping to win big money are married couple Trevor and Steph from Castle Donington, salsa-dancing brothers Lloyd and Lionel, and St Albans couple Sophie and Joe. Hosted by Adil Ray.
Seeking success are Reuben and Corinne, a couple from south-west Scotland, Sophie and her niece Charlotte from Colchester, and Paulette and Gary, a married couple from Sandwell.
Looking to reign supreme are Cathy and Dermot, a married couple of 46 years from Bollington, Sasha and Jono, a couple from Nottingham, and engaged couple Ben and Yaz from Reading.
